title: Foreign Language Medical Emergency
initial_variations: {caller_name} speaks rapidly in {language_phrase}, repeating 'help' and '{specific_details}'. Background sounds include {ambient_audio}.
A distressed voice says '{language_phrase}' followed by '{specific_details}'. {ambient_audio} is audible.
Caller frantically says '{language_phrase}' and '{specific_details}'. You hear {ambient_audio}.

initial: Can you say that in English?
Help is on the way, stay calm
We're coming, just stay on the line
frustrated: Please stay calm, help is coming
I'm working on it, don't panic
repeating: I hear you, help is on the way
Stay with me, paramedics are coming
clarified: Good, you're doing well, help is almost there

SEND_POLICE.feedback: Police arrived but could not provide medical aid. Ambulance dispatched after delay. Patient survived, but critical time lost.

SEND_FIRE.feedback: Firefighters arrived with medical training, but no fire. Ambulance was needed. Patient treated, but resources mismanaged.

SEND_MEDICAL.feedback: Ambulance arrived quickly with translator. Patient received life-saving care. Great call handling!

ANIMAL_CONTROL.feedback: Animal control dispatched to a medical emergency. Patient died before proper help arrived. Unforgivable error.

DISMISS.feedback: Call dismissed as prank. Patient found dead hours later. Career-ending mistake.

title: Fire with Speech Impediment
initial_variations: {caller_name} stutters urgently, 'F-f-fire! Sm-smoke! {address_location}'. Coughing and {ambient_audio} heard.
Choking sounds, then '{address_location}... fire... h-help!' Followed by {ambient_audio}.

initial: I hear you, help is on the way
panicked: Try to stay low, cover your mouth
We're sending help, stay on the line
breathing: Good, you're doing well. Keep breathing slowly.
coughing: I know it's hard, but try to stay calm
Help is almost there, hang on

initial: I need you to breathe with me: in... out...
Are you able to breathe? Take a slow breath
panicked: In through the nose, out through the mouth
coughing: I know you're coughing, but try to take deep breaths if you can

SEND_POLICE.feedback: Police arrived first, evacuated building. Fire department called afterward. No injuries, but fire spread further.

SEND_FIRE.feedback: Firefighters extinguished the blaze. Caller rescued from smoke inhalation. Perfect response despite language barrier.

SEND_MEDICAL.feedback: Ambulance arrived but no medical emergency yet. Fire needed. Firefighters arrived later. Caller suffered smoke inhalation.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.feedback: Animal control dispatched to a fire. Building burned down; caller perished. Severe misjudgment.

DISMISS.feedback: Call dismissed as gibberish. Fire raged; multiple fatalities. Dispatcher fired.

title: The Garbled Whisper
description: A caller hides from an intruder, whispering frantically but the line is poor, making words unintelligible.
initial_variations: I... I can't... {caller_name} is... at {address_location}... {specific_details}... hurry!

SEND_POLICE.feedback: Police arrive to find the intruder subdued. Caller safe.

SEND_FIRE.feedback: Firefighters show up but there's no fire. Wastes resources.

SEND_MEDICAL.feedback: Paramedics arrive; no injuries but caller is shaken.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.feedback: Animal control is useless; intruder escapes.

DISMISS.feedback: Call dismissed as prank; caller is attacked.

title: The Stroke Confusion
description: A caller is having a stroke, speech slurred and nonsensical, unable to articulate clearly.

SEND_MEDICAL.feedback: Paramedics arrive and provide stroke care. Caller saved.

SEND_POLICE.feedback: Police arrive but cannot provide medical aid. Delay.

SEND_FIRE.feedback: Firefighters assist but medical transport needed.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.feedback: Animal control useless; caller's condition worsens.

DISMISS.feedback: Call dismissed as prank; caller suffers permanent damage.

title: The Relay Misunderstanding
description: A deaf caller uses video relay, but the interpreter misinterprets signs, leading to confusion about a medical emergency.
initial_variations: Relay operator: Caller signs {caller_name} at {address_location} needs {specific_details}.

SEND_MEDICAL.feedback: Medical team arrives and treats the real emergency after relay clarification.

SEND_POLICE.feedback: Police arrive, but medical is needed. Delay.

SEND_FIRE.feedback: Fire department shows up; no fire, but assist with entry.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.feedback: Animal control has no role; situation worsens.

DISMISS.feedback: Call dismissed as misinterpretation; caller's condition deteriorates.

title: The Panicked Foreigner
description: A caller speaks a rare dialect, only knows 'help' and 'bleeding' in English, struggling to convey the emergency.

SEND_MEDICAL.feedback: Medics arrive and provide translation app assistance. Victim treated.

SEND_POLICE.feedback: Police help with translation but medical needed.

SEND_FIRE.feedback: Firefighters assist but no fire; delay.

title: The Muffled Attack
description: A caller is being assaulted, phone in pocket, only muffled sounds and struggles are heard.

SEND_POLICE.feedback: Police arrive and arrest attacker. Caller rescued.

SEND_MEDICAL.feedback: Paramedics treat injuries but police needed.

SEND_FIRE.feedback: Firefighters break in but cannot subdue attacker.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.feedback: Animal control has no effect; attacker escalates.

DISMISS.feedback: Call dismissed as muffled pocket dial; caller is severely beaten.

title: Stuttered Warning
description: A caller with a severe stutter tries to report a home invasion in progress. The dispatcher must remain patient and use calming techniques to extract critical information.

states.initial: The caller is panicked and stuttering heavily, barely able to form words.
states.hiding: The caller has retreated to a hiding spot and whispers, but speech remains stuttered.
states.confronting: The caller is face-to-face with the intruder and speaking rapidly out of fear.
states.secured: Police have arrived and the situation is under control.

initial_variations: I-I-I can't... he's h-here! {caller_name} needs help!

specific_details: a tall man in a mask

initial: It's {address_location} - the house on the corner!
secured: Police are here. Thank you. {address_location} is safe now.

confronting: He's pointing a gun at me! {specific_details}
secured: The intruder is in handcuffs. Details match your report.

hiding: Safe for now, but he's close
confronting: I'm in danger! He's threatening me!
secured: I'm safe now, thanks to you.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police dispatched and arrived quickly. The intruder was apprehended. The caller is safe.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire trucks arrived but there was no fire. The caller was attended to, but resources were wasted.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medical personnel arrived to find no injuries. They provided comfort but were not needed.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control sent. The intruder escaped while waiting. The caller is traumatized.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as non-emergency. The caller was attacked and seriously injured.

title: Lost in Translation
description: A non-English speaking caller reports a fire using broken English. The dispatcher uses a translation service to understand the emergency.

states.initial: Caller speaks limited English, panic evident. Only key words are understood.
states.translated: Translator is on the line, clarifying details.
states.evacuated: Caller and others are moving to safety.

translated: The address is {address_location}. Please send fire department.
We are at {address_location}. There is a fire.
The fire is a {specific_details}. We can hear {ambient_audio}.
It started from {specific_details}. The alarm is {ambient_audio}.
evacuated: We are safe outside. The fire was {specific_details}.
Everyone is out. The fire was in the {specific_details}.
extinguished: The fire was {specific_details}. It has been put out.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrived to find a fire. They assisted with evacuation but fire needed.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire department dispatched and extinguished the fire quickly. No injuries.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medical crew treated minor smoke inhalation but were not critically needed.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control sent instead of fire. The fire spread, causing extensive damage.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed due to language barrier. The building burned down, multiple casualties.

title: Silent Button
description: A mute caller uses touch-tones to communicate during a home invasion. The dispatcher must interpret the beeps to send help.

states.initial: Caller cannot speak, uses phone buttons to tap responses. Ambient sounds indicate a threat.
states.hiding: Caller is hiding and tapping softly.
states.confronting: Caller is in immediate danger, tapping frantically.
states.secured: Police have arrived and the intruder is subdued.

initial_variations: 1 long press + 911 call (caller presses numbers to indicate distress). {ambient_audio}
Tap... tap... (rhythmic pattern). {address_location} sent via text?

initial: Tap once for yes, twice for no. Is your address {address_location}? (waits for taps)
If address is valid, press 1. (caller presses 1)
hiding: Caller taps twice to confirm address {address_location}.
confronting: Caller taps rapidly - address confirmed but urgent.
Caller does not tap - wrong address?
secured: Address confirmed. Police are on scene.

initial: Press 1 for intruder present, 2 for not sure. (caller presses 1)
What can you hear? (caller taps pattern for {ambient_audio})
Can you spell your name with numbers?
hiding: Caller does not respond - name unknown.
confronting: No response for name - too stressed.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police dispatched based on touch-tone coordinates. Intruder arrested, caller safe.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire trucks arrived; no fire. Caller traumatized by delay.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Medical team treated caller for shock but police were needed.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control sent; intruder escaped. Caller badly injured.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as silent. Caller found dead.

title: Stroke Code
description: A stroke victim calls 911 but can only say 'yes' and 'no' with slurred speech. The dispatcher uses yes/no questions to identify a life-threatening medical emergency.

states.initial: Caller's speech is severely slurred, only able to utter affirmatives and negatives.
states.assessing: Dispatcher is asking yes/no questions to evaluate symptoms.
states.collapse: Caller has collapsed and cannot respond.
states.treated: Medical help has arrived and the caller is being treated.

assessing: We have your location as {address_location}. Do you confirm? (yes/no)
collapse: Caller unresponsive. Address traced from phone.

initial: Is one side of your body weak? (caller: 'yes')

assessing: Caller cannot provide name. Using phone number.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrived but medical attention was delayed. Caller survived but with deficits.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters provided first aid but ambulance was needed. Caller had a stroke.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: EMS dispatched and recognized stroke. Caller received clot buster and recovered fully.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control sent. Caller untreated, suffered permanent brain damage.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as prank. Caller died from stroke.

title: Relay Miscommunication
description: A deaf caller uses a relay service to report a domestic disturbance, but the relay operator misinterprets the message as a medical emergency. The dispatcher must clarify through the relay.

states.initial: Relay operator on the line, transmitting the deaf caller's text. Initial message is ambiguous.
states.clarifying: Dispatcher works with relay to get accurate details.
states.escalated: The situation is worsening, caller in immediate danger.
states.resolved: Police intervene and the domestic situation is handled.

initial_variations: Relay operator: 'Caller says: My husband is hurting me. {address_location}. Help.' (typed calmly)
Relay: 'Caller signs: Emergency! {ambient_audio}. {caller_name} scared.' (via video relay)
Relay: 'Caller reports: {specific_details} at {address_location}. Need police.' (but words are jumbled)
Relay: 'Caller says: I am sick. {address_location}. Send doctor.' (misinterpretation of signs)

initial: Relay: Address: {address_location} - is that correct? Confirm via relay.
escalated: Relay: Caller is being dragged away, but location is {address_location}.

initial: Relay: Caller says it's a medical emergency. (Dispatcher doubts)
Relay: Caller reports {specific_details} - but is that accurate?
clarifying: Relay: After clarifying, caller is being assaulted. {specific_details}.
Relay: The caller is not sick; they need police for {specific_details}.
escalated: Relay: Caller screams - 'He has a knife!' {specific_details}.
Relay: Abuser took phone - but info is {ambient_audio}.
Relay: Caller cannot respond now, but name is {caller_name}.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police dispatched correctly. Domestic violence stopped, abuser arrested.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire department responded to 'medical' call. Police arrived late, caller injured.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics treated the caller for injuries, but police backup was delayed.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control sent. The abuser escalated and caused serious harm.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as relay error. The caller was beaten severely and hospitalized.

title: The Muffled Cry for Help

states.initial: Caller's voice is muffled, as if speaking through a gag or from behind a door. Only fragmented words and sobbing are audible.
states.muffled: Caller attempts to speak but sounds are heavily muffled, with occasional clear words like 'help' or a name.
states.escalating: Background noises intensify (e.g., banging, shouting) and caller's muffled sounds become more desperate.
states.silent: All sound stops abruptly; line remains open with silence or faint breathing.

initial_variations: {caller_name} is crying and trying to speak, but it's muffled. I hear {ambient_audio} in the background.
{caller_name} says something like 'please' through what sounds like a gag. Address might be {address_location}.
I can barely hear {caller_name}; it's like they're gagged. There's {ambient_audio} and then muffled screams.
The line is open but {caller_name} only makes muffled sounds. I think I heard {specific_details} before the gagging.

initial: {address_location}? I think they said something like 'Maple' but it's hard.
I'm not sure, they just keep crying. Maybe check {address_location}?
The address is garbled, but background has {ambient_audio}.
muffled: They said '123'? It came through a bit. Possibly {address_location}.
The muffled words sound like an address, but I can't make it out.
escalating: There's crashing now! The address might be {address_location} but I'm not sure.
Too much noise! But I think I heard {address_location}.
silent: No response. Last known address from the call might be {address_location}.

initial: They're crying and saying 'help' and something about {specific_details}.
I think {specific_details} is happening, but it's muffled.
muffled: I could make out 'help me, he's {specific_details}'.
escalating: Screaming now! I think {specific_details} is getting worse.
They're trying to say {specific_details} but it's chaos.
silent: Nothing now. But earlier they indicated {specific_details}.

initial: I don't think they're safe. Muffled sounds of distress.
escalating: Definitely not safe. Sounds of a struggle.
silent: I can't tell now, but previously it was dangerous.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrived at {address_location} and found {caller_name} being held hostage. Resolved safely.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire department responded but found no fire. However, they assisted police in gaining entry.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics arrived but no injuries requiring medical attention. Police handled the situation.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control showed up to a hostage situation. Victims' safety compromised; suspect escaped.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as muffled noise. Later discovered {caller_name} was murdered. Investigation ongoing.

title: The Non-English Speaking Emergency

states.initial: Caller speaks in a foreign language, sounding panicked. Only a few English words like 'help' or 'please' are mixed in.
states.struggling: Caller tries to use broken English or repeats the same word, clearly frustrated.
states.translated: Dispatcher uses a translation service or phrase book to communicate basic needs.
states.resolved: Caller's situation clarified and appropriate response dispatched.

initial_variations: {caller_name} is speaking in {language} very fast. I hear {ambient_audio} and the word 'help'.
{caller_name} doesn't speak English. They keep saying '{language}' phrases and seem scared. Address might be {address_location}.
The caller is crying and speaking {language}. I can only understand '{specific_details}'.
This sounds like {language}. Caller says {specific_details} and I hear {ambient_audio}.

initial: I think they said an address in their language, but I can't confirm. Possibly {address_location}.
They pointed to a street sign? It looks like {address_location}.
struggling: They're repeating a number: '123'? Could be {address_location}.
They're pointing at the phone screen? Maybe we can trace.

initial: They keep saying '{specific_details}' in their language.
struggling: They mimed {specific_details} and pointed to chest.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police responded but found it was a medical emergency. After language barrier resolved, paramedics were needed.

SEND_FIRE.message: Fire department arrived to a non-fire emergency. Assisted with interpretation.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics arrived and provided aid for {specific_details}. Communication barrier overcome.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control dispatched to a medical emergency. Delay caused worsened condition.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as not English. {caller_name} died from {specific_details}. Massive failure.

title: The Stroke Victim's Slurred Speech

states.initial: Caller's speech is severely slurred and slow, as if under the influence or having a stroke. Words are jumbled.
states.slurring: Speech worsens; only partial words like 'help', 'face' or 'arm' are recognizable.
states.confused: Caller seems disoriented, repeats same word, or goes silent. Breathing audible.
states.unresponsive: Caller stops responding; line open but no verbal output.

initial_variations: {caller_name} is slurring badly. I hear {ambient_audio} and they said something about {specific_details}.
{caller_name} sounds like they're having a stroke. They keep saying '{specific_details}' and the address comes out as {address_location}.
Speech is extremely garbled. I think I heard '{specific_details}' and the location might be {address_location}.
{caller_name} is struggling to speak. They repeated '{specific_details}' and there's {ambient_audio}.

initial: They mumbled something that sounds like {address_location}.
I think the address is {address_location} but not sure.
slurring: They tried to say address, came out as '{address_location}' maybe.
confused: They're not responding to location questions. Might be at home, possibly {address_location}.
No clear address, but registered to {address_location}.
unresponsive: No answer. We can trace the call to {address_location}.

confused: They keep repeating a word – might be {specific_details}.
Not able to get details, but classic stroke signs.
unresponsive: No details now, but earlier indicated {specific_details}.

initial: I think they are alone. They said 'alone'?
slurring: Can't tell, but I hear only one voice.
Might be alone, no background voices.
confused: Probably alone if no one else is heard.
unresponsive: Assumed alone since no other sounds.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrived and recognized stroke symptoms immediately. Called paramedics. Time lost.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters arrived but could not provide medical care. Delayed treatment.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics arrived quickly and administered clot-busting drugs. {caller_name} recovered well.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control dispatched. {caller_name} suffered permanent disability due to delay.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as drunk caller. {caller_name} died from stroke. Lawsuit pending.

title: The Silent Keypad Tones

states.initial: Caller says nothing but taps on the phone keypad. Tones are rhythmic, possibly a code.
states.tapping: Tapping continues with pauses. Dispatcher can respond and hear taps in reply.
states.code_breakthrough: Dispatcher deciphers pattern (e.g., 1=yes, 2=no) or caller types numbers that spell words.
states.no_response: Tapping stops abruptly; line goes silent.

initial_variations: {caller_name} is silent but I hear tapping tones. They might be in danger. {ambient_audio} in background.
No speaking, just keypad tones. Pattern suggests they're trying to communicate. Address possibly {address_location}.
The caller is using touch tones. I think they're saying {specific_details} with the keys.
I hear tapping and {ambient_audio}. Could be a silent emergency. Dispatcher needs to interpret.

initial: I think they tapped the address: {address_location}? Let me decode.
Tones might be address. We can trace anyway.
tapping: They just tapped 5 times – maybe zip code for {address_location}.
no_response: No taps now. Last known phone location is {address_location}.

initial: First tap sequence was short – maybe 'help' or {specific_details}.
tapping: They tapped '1' for yes when I asked about {specific_details}.
no_response: No details now, but earlier taps indicated {specific_details}.

tapping: They tapped '1' when I asked if in danger.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police arrived silently and apprehended {specific_details}. Caller rescued.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters arrived but no fire. However, they helped secure scene.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics arrived, no medical emergency. Police handled it.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control arrived to a hostage situation. Suspect fled, caller injured.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as prank. {caller_name} later found dead. Tragedy.

title: The Deaf Caller Using TTY

states.initial: Call comes in via TTY relay. Text is garbled or has typos. Caller types frantically but messages are broken.
states.garbled: Messages are incomplete due to TTY errors. Caller tries to retype.
states.clear_text: Dispatcher manages to get coherent sentences. Caller describes emergency.
states.disconnected: TTY line drops; no further communication.

initial_variations: TTY call from {caller_name}. Messages are garbled: '{specific_details}'. Address might be {address_location}.
Relay operator is having trouble. Caller types '{specific_details}' and I hear {ambient_audio} on the line.
Deaf caller using TTY. Text is messy: 'HELP {specific_details} AT {address_location}'.
{caller_name} is typing but the TTY is cutting out. I see '{specific_details}' and {ambient_audio}.

disconnected: We have the last known address: {address_location}.

clear_text: They say they are in immediate danger.

SEND_POLICE.message: Police responded to {address_location} and found {specific_details}. Caller safe.

SEND_FIRE.message: Firefighters arrived, but it was a police matter. They assisted.

SEND_MEDICAL.message: Paramedics arrived but no injuries. Police handled disturbance.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.message: Animal control dispatched to a break-in. Suspect escaped, caller traumatized.

DISMISS.message: Call dismissed as TTY spam. {caller_name} was assaulted and died. Failure.

title: The Heavily Accented Caller
description: A caller with a strong regional accent struggles to communicate a medical emergency. The dispatcher must parse garbled words and deduce the situation.

repeating: Same address – {address_location}. Can you not understand?
straining: I already told you, {address_location}. Are you coming?

initial: He's {specific_details}. I don't know what else to say.
repeating: {specific_details} – that's all I can say. Just come!

initial: He's {specific_details}. Can you understand? Please send help!
I think it's {specific_details}. Maybe heart attack?
repeating: It's {specific_details}, I told you! Are you deaf?

SEND_POLICE.feedback: Police arrived, but no crime. They assisted with language barrier and called medical.

SEND_FIRE.feedback: Firefighters responded, but no fire. They helped calm the caller and requested medical.

SEND_MEDICAL.feedback: Ambulance arrived promptly. Victim treated for heart attack en route to hospital. Caller's accent was challenging but vital information was deduced.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.feedback: Animal control arrived to find a medical emergency. Delay caused by wrong dispatch. Victim's condition worsened.

DISMISS.feedback: Call dismissed as unclear. Victim found dead later by family. Tragic miscommunication.

title: The Slurred Speech Emergency
description: A caller is having a stroke, making speech unintelligible. Dispatcher must use minimal cues and background sounds to locate and assist.
initial_variations: Hello? I... I think {caller_name} is... {specific_details} at {address_location}. Help... {ambient_audio}
This is {caller_name}. Something wrong with {victim_relation}. {specific_details}... can't talk right. {address_location} {ambient_audio}

initial: I think {victim_relation} had a {specific_details}. Can't speak well.
One side of body not moving.
collapsing: He's on the floor... not responding...

SEND_POLICE.feedback: Police arrived, recognized stroke symptoms, called paramedics. Delay but victim survived with minor aftereffects.

SEND_FIRE.feedback: Firefighters first on scene, provided basic first aid and called medical. Lacked advanced stroke care equipment.

SEND_MEDICAL.feedback: Paramedics arrived quickly, administered clot-busting drug. Victim recovered fully with minimal disability.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.feedback: Animal control sent to a stroke emergency. Victim suffered permanent brain damage due to delayed treatment.

DISMISS.feedback: Call dismissed as unintelligible. Victim died from preventable stroke. Tragic loss.

title: The Garbled Translation Call
description: A non-English speaker uses a translation app that produces garbled text-to-speech. Dispatcher must piece together a fire emergency from broken phrases.

SEND_POLICE.feedback: Police arrived, evacuated building, called fire department. Victim had minor smoke inhalation.

SEND_FIRE.feedback: Firefighters extinguished fire quickly. All occupants rescued. Translation app partly usable.

SEND_MEDICAL.feedback: Medics on scene treated minor injuries but fire still burning. Fire department called separately.

ANIMAL_CONTROL.feedback: Animal control arrived at fire scene. Unable to help. Fire spread, causing extensive damage.

DISMISS.feedback: Call dismissed as garbled. Building burned down with fatalities. Communication breakdown tragedy.
